text: Immersed in this brightly lit, glass-walled room with its colorful display on research and development, I am struck by a sense of intellectual curiosity. The juxtaposition of order and creativity—geometry and unexpected color—awakens in me both wonder and contemplation. Here, I feel the urge to question how human knowledge progresses and how spaces shape our inquiry. I am eager, thoughtful, slightly dislocated by the tilted view, which nudges me to reconsider my usual perspectives.
